autoApprove: local captured file exists in data/raw/assets
hero/banner background-only at >=1200x300 and aspect >=2.2, or home hero object-only at >=600x160
autoBlock: candidate variant with embedded copy/logo/promotion text signal
manualReview: missing dimensions or missing local capture
object/card/icon-like assets outside the narrow auto-approval scope

manualReview.llmDescription: Generated text-free hero background candidate. Use only after visual and brand review promotes it from candidate to approved.
Generated text-free hero background candidate. Use only after visual and brand review promotes it from candidate to approved.
